title: Mannequin Wearing Stylish Asymmetric Black Skirt and White Sleeveless Top
description: A mannequin dressed in a fashionable asymmetric black skirt with an uneven hemline paired with a simple white sleeveless top. The outfit is accessorized with minimalist gold hoop earrings and a gold bracelet. The scene features a plain neutral backdrop and soft studio lighting that highlights the fabric texture and skirt shape, emphasizing the asymmetry details in a clean, minimal composition.
